hero.title: AI for Real Estate Agent
hero.description: Your virtual assistant modernizes real estate by managing property viewings, recording client notes, tracking appointment schedules, sending follow-up reminders, & supporting seamless communication

stats.label: Fewer missed viewings and client meetings thanks to automated reminders.
Reduced hours spent on scheduling, documentation, and client follow-ups.
Higher deal closure rates through consistent lead tracking and personalized client care.

intro.title: AI Virtual Receptionist for Real Estate Agents

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Manage Your Real Estate Leads
blocks.description: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we know real estate moves fast — and missed calls can mean missed opportunities. Our AI Virtual Receptionist is built specifically for real estate agents and agencies, managing property inquiries, inspection bookings, and client communication with speed and professionalism. Whether you're a solo agent, part of a boutique agency, or managing a larger team, our AI adapts seamlessly to your workflow.

blocks.heading: Focus on Listings and Clients, Not Calls
blocks.description: Your AI Receptionist handles incoming calls, texts, and online inquiries while you're busy with open homes, client meetings, or property showings. It can answer questions like 'When is the next inspection?', 'Is the property still available?', or 'Can I get a rental application link?' instantly and accurately. It also books appointments, confirms inspections, and captures lead information directly into your CRM.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Buyer, Tenant, or Vendor Opportunity
blocks.description: Even when you're with clients or after hours, your AI Receptionist ensures every inquiry is answered. It provides up-to-date property details, schedules appraisals, books rental inspections, and forwards qualified leads straight to your team. You'll never lose a sale or listing because of a missed call again.

keyBenefits.subtitle: Enhance your real estate business with intelligent automation that reduces admin work, personalizes service, and increases productivity.

cards.title: 24/7 Availability

cards.title: Boost Client Experience

cards.title: Improved Client Care

cards.title: Time-Saving Automation

cards.title: Boosted Client Retention

cards.title: Centralized History

whyChooseUs.title: Why Real Estate Agents Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.description: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by real estate professionals across Australia — from independent agents to full-service property management firms. It integrates seamlessly with your CRM, property listing software, and calendar tools, handling calls and appointments with accuracy and professionalism. Most importantly, your AI Receptionist can be trained to your exact business requirements — adapting to your workflow, tone, and client experience. Let our AI handle your reception so you can focus on what matters most — closing deals, growing your listings, and delivering outstanding service.

card.heading: Simplify Client Notes and Follow-Ups
card.description: After each inspection or meeting, you can record short voice memos that are automatically transcribed and summarized. Your AI system can log these notes against each client or property record, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks. Upload property reports, offers, and client feedback directly into your dashboard — keeping everything organized and accessible.
